inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Rate used to discount future cash flows to present value. 0% for simple CLV.

businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa utilizada para descontar flujos de efectivo futuros a su valor presente. 0% para CLV simple.
